description: Codex's response to a peer's challenge of its findings. One entry per disputed finding. OpenAI structured outputs requires EVERY property to be listed in `required`, so the revise-only fields are nullable rather than optional — send null when position is not `revise`. Do not add minItems/minLength here; they are rejected.

id.description: The finding id being responded to.

position.description: concede = the challenge is correct, withdraw the finding. hold = the finding stands as written. revise = the finding is real but the severity or the recommendation was wrong.

reasoning.description: Why. Engage with the specific evidence the challenger cited; do not restate the original finding.

revised_severity.description: Set when position is revise. null otherwise.

revised_recommendation.description: Set when position is revise and the fix changed. null otherwise.
